name: sgs/responsive-logo
title: SGS Responsive Logo
description: Three-slot logo block (desktop / tablet / mobile) with optional SVG animation. Competitive moat: H/Square/Mark aspect-ratio variants per breakpoint.

supports._comment_parallax: Parallax deliberately excluded — not appropriate for a header logo.

align._comment: FR-36-22 basics: explicit left-align default (NN/g: 6x better home-return). Plain string (no enum) mirrors WP core's auto-injected align attribute shape — matches the supports.align list above without a coercion risk (D291 gotcha: an out-of-enum stored value silently resets to default).

logoSwitchMode._comment: When the compact/alternate logo replaces the desktop logo. mobile = at the mobile tier (<=767px viewport); tablet = at the tablet tier (<=1023px viewport); custom = at the operator's own breakpoint (<= logoSwitchCustomPx, viewport). Only takes effect once an alternate (mobile or tablet) logo is set.

svgAnimationSource._comment: Media library ID of a .svg file. NEVER accept inline SVG paste — XSS risk. Force upload via media library only.

maxWidth._comment: FR-36-22 basics: per-tier max box. null/unset = no cap.
